item.title: v3.17.14-a 更新：整合Claude Code、新增SAP AI等功能，修正多處問題
item.itunes:title: v3.17.14-a 更新：整合Claude Code、新增SAP AI等功能，修正多處問題
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Refactor copy buttons by @shouhanzen in #3456
  • return files if targeted directory is hidden by @celestial-vault in #4176
  • saveClineMessagesAndUpdateHistory to state utils file by @celestial-vault in #4190
  • Generate grpc-js services and clients by @sjf in #4199
  • Format files before commit by @sjf in #4155
  • Terminal profile setting by @valinha in #4079
  • new feature github template + readme by @0xToshii in #4211
  • Add a linter for proto files by @sjf in #4179
  • Mcp rich display setting by @Vl4diC0de in #4029
  • chore(bedrock): remove @anthropic-ai/bedrock-sdk by @watany-dev in #4162
  • Increase the number of retries for Bedrock. Refs #213 by @friedmud in #4114
  • add terminal setting to allow users to constrain terminal output by @0xToshii in #4150
  • Fix MCP Schema support by @arafatkatze in #4166
  • SAP AI Core as a Provider by @schardosin in #3980
  • Update developer reset to allow for resetting workspace settings. by @dcbartlett in #4229
  • Catch Anthropic Context Overload Error Better by @celestial-vault in #4235
  • Fix: Checkmark control menu improvements by @canvrno in #4218
  • fix sap provider by @0xToshii in #4240
  • Add fixes for the grpc handler and client for the host bridge service by @sjf in #4221
  • Feat: Exclude clinerules from checkpoints by @canvrno in #4236
  • Feat: Reduce diff edit errors when restoring tasks w/o checkpoints by @canvrno in #4232
  • Add host bridge clients for the standalone service by @sjf in #4259
  • Solve Terminal running race conditions by @arafatkatze in #4217
  • Fix: clineMessages not storing all checkpoints commitHashes by @canvrno in #4225
  • fix: Clear the input when the user changes mode within a task by @BarreiroT in #4242
  • feat: Integrate Claude Code by @BarreiroT in #4111
  • Fix: Race condition leading to task restoration, checkpoints issues by @canvrno in #4226
  • Update star icon alignment within Auto-approve settings, to avoid confusion from double-column format by @rameshvr in #3935
  • supporting legacy search and replace blocks too by @pashpashpash in #4264
  • Fix windows build by @sjf in #4270

New Contributors

  • @Vl4diC0de made their first contribution in #4029
  • @friedmud made their first contribution in #4114
  • @schardosin made their first contribution in #3980
  • @rameshvr made their first contribution in #3935

Full Changelog: v3.17.13...v3.17.14-a
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Refactor copy buttons by @shouhanzen in #3456
  • return files if targeted directory is hidden by @celestial-vault in #4176
  • saveClineMessagesAndUpdateHistory to state utils file by @celestial-vault in #4190
  • Generate grpc-js services and clients by @sjf in #4199
  • Format files before commit by @sjf in #4155
  • Terminal profile setting by @valinha in #4079
  • new feature github template + readme by @0xToshii in #4211
  • Add a linter for proto files by @sjf in #4179
  • Mcp rich display setting by @Vl4diC0de in #4029
  • chore(bedrock): remove @anthropic-ai/bedrock-sdk by @watany-dev in #4162
  • Increase the number of retries for Bedrock. Refs #213 by @friedmud in #4114
  • add terminal setting to allow users to constrain terminal output by @0xToshii in #4150
  • Fix MCP Schema support by @arafatkatze in #4166
  • SAP AI Core as a Provider by @schardosin in #3980
  • Update developer reset to allow for resetting workspace settings. by @dcbartlett in #4229
  • Catch Anthropic Context Overload Error Better by @celestial-vault in #4235
  • Fix: Checkmark control menu improvements by @canvrno in #4218
  • fix sap provider by @0xToshii in #4240
  • Add fixes for the grpc handler and client for the host bridge service by @sjf in #4221
  • Feat: Exclude clinerules from checkpoints by @canvrno in #4236
  • Feat: Reduce diff edit errors when restoring tasks w/o checkpoints by @canvrno in #4232
  • Add host bridge clients for the standalone service by @sjf in #4259
  • Solve Terminal running race conditions by @arafatkatze in #4217
  • Fix: clineMessages not storing all checkpoints commitHashes by @canvrno in #4225
  • fix: Clear the input when the user changes mode within a task by @BarreiroT in #4242
  • feat: Integrate Claude Code by @BarreiroT in #4111
  • Fix: Race condition leading to task restoration, checkpoints issues by @canvrno in #4226
  • Update star icon alignment within Auto-approve settings, to avoid confusion from double-column format by @rameshvr in #3935
  • supporting legacy search and replace blocks too by @pashpashpash in #4264
  • Fix windows build by @sjf in #4270

New Contributors

  • @Vl4diC0de made their first contribution in #4029
  • @friedmud made their first contribution in #4114
  • @schardosin made their first contribution in #3980
  • @rameshvr made their first contribution in #3935

Full Changelog: v3.17.13...v3.17.14-a
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Refactor copy buttons by @shouhanzen in #3456
  • return files if targeted directory is hidden by @celestial-vault in #4176
  • saveClineMessagesAndUpdateHistory to state utils file by @celestial-vault in #4190
  • Generate grpc-js services and clients by @sjf in #4199
  • Format files before commit by @sjf in #4155
  • Terminal profile setting by @valinha in #4079
  • new feature github template + readme by @0xToshii in #4211
  • Add a linter for proto files by @sjf in #4179
  • Mcp rich display setting by @Vl4diC0de in #4029
  • chore(bedrock): remove @anthropic-ai/bedrock-sdk by @watany-dev in #4162
  • Increase the number of retries for Bedrock. Refs #213 by @friedmud in #4114
  • add terminal setting to allow users to constrain terminal output by @0xToshii in #4150
  • Fix MCP Schema support by @arafatkatze in #4166
  • SAP AI Core as a Provider by @schardosin in #3980
  • Update developer reset to allow for resetting workspace settings. by @dcbartlett in #4229
  • Catch Anthropic Context Overload Error Better by @celestial-vault in #4235
  • Fix: Checkmark control menu improvements by @canvrno in #4218
  • fix sap provider by @0xToshii in #4240
  • Add fixes for the grpc handler and client for the host bridge service by @sjf in #4221
  • Feat: Exclude clinerules from checkpoints by @canvrno in #4236
  • Feat: Reduce diff edit errors when restoring tasks w/o checkpoints by @canvrno in #4232
  • Add host bridge clients for the standalone service by @sjf in #4259
  • Solve Terminal running race conditions by @arafatkatze in #4217
  • Fix: clineMessages not storing all checkpoints commitHashes by @canvrno in #4225
  • fix: Clear the input when the user changes mode within a task by @BarreiroT in #4242
  • feat: Integrate Claude Code by @BarreiroT in #4111
  • Fix: Race condition leading to task restoration, checkpoints issues by @canvrno in #4226
  • Update star icon alignment within Auto-approve settings, to avoid confusion from double-column format by @rameshvr in #3935
  • supporting legacy search and replace blocks too by @pashpashpash in #4264
  • Fix windows build by @sjf in #4270

New Contributors

  • @Vl4diC0de made their first contribution in #4029
  • @friedmud made their first contribution in #4114
  • @schardosin made their first contribution in #3980
  • @rameshvr made their first contribution in #3935

Full Changelog: v3.17.13...v3.17.14-a

item.title: v3.17.13 版本推出：新增 Gemini 思考 UX，強化 AI 功能及平台體驗
item.itunes:title: v3.17.13 版本推出：新增 Gemini 思考 UX，強化 AI 功能及平台體驗
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add Thinking UX for Gemini models, providing visual feedback during model reasoning
  • Add support for Notifications MCP integration with Cline
  • Add prompt caching indicator for Grok 3 models
  • Sort MCP marketplace by newest listings by default for easier discovery of recent servers
  • Update O3 model family pricing to reflect latest OpenAI rates
  • Remove '-beta' suffix from Grok model identifiers
  • Fix AWS Bedrock provider by removing deprecated Anthropic-Bedrock SDK (Thanks @watany-dev!)
  • Fix menu display issue for terminal timeout settings
  • Improve chat input field styling and behavior

Full Changelog: v3.17.12...v3.17.13
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add Thinking UX for Gemini models, providing visual feedback during model reasoning
  • Add support for Notifications MCP integration with Cline
  • Add prompt caching indicator for Grok 3 models
  • Sort MCP marketplace by newest listings by default for easier discovery of recent servers
  • Update O3 model family pricing to reflect latest OpenAI rates
  • Remove '-beta' suffix from Grok model identifiers
  • Fix AWS Bedrock provider by removing deprecated Anthropic-Bedrock SDK (Thanks @watany-dev!)
  • Fix menu display issue for terminal timeout settings
  • Improve chat input field styling and behavior

Full Changelog: v3.17.12...v3.17.13
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Add Thinking UX for Gemini models, providing visual feedback during model reasoning
  • Add support for Notifications MCP integration with Cline
  • Add prompt caching indicator for Grok 3 models
  • Sort MCP marketplace by newest listings by default for easier discovery of recent servers
  • Update O3 model family pricing to reflect latest OpenAI rates
  • Remove '-beta' suffix from Grok model identifiers
  • Fix AWS Bedrock provider by removing deprecated Anthropic-Bedrock SDK (Thanks @watany-dev!)
  • Fix menu display issue for terminal timeout settings
  • Improve chat input field styling and behavior

Full Changelog: v3.17.12...v3.17.13

item.title: Cline v3.17.12 更新：免費 Grok 3 模型上線，介面與錯誤修復
item.itunes:title: Cline v3.17.12 更新：免費 Grok 3 模型上線，介面與錯誤修復
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Free Grok Model Available! Access Grok 3 completely free through the Cline provider
  • Add collapsible MCP response panels to keep conversations focused on the main AI responses while still allowing access to detailed MCP output (Thanks @valinha!)
  • Prioritize active files (open tabs) at the top of the file context menu when using @ mentions (Thanks @abeatrix!)
  • Fix context menu to properly default to "File" option instead of incorrectly selecting "Git Commits"
  • Fix diff editing to handle out-of-order SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, improving reliability with models that don't follow strict ordering
  • Fix telemetry warning popup appearing repeatedly for users who have telemetry disabled

New Contributors

  • @abeatrix made their first contribution in #4048
  • @valinha made their first contribution in #3528

Full Changelog: v3.17.11...v3.17.12
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Free Grok Model Available! Access Grok 3 completely free through the Cline provider
  • Add collapsible MCP response panels to keep conversations focused on the main AI responses while still allowing access to detailed MCP output (Thanks @valinha!)
  • Prioritize active files (open tabs) at the top of the file context menu when using @ mentions (Thanks @abeatrix!)
  • Fix context menu to properly default to "File" option instead of incorrectly selecting "Git Commits"
  • Fix diff editing to handle out-of-order SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, improving reliability with models that don't follow strict ordering
  • Fix telemetry warning popup appearing repeatedly for users who have telemetry disabled

New Contributors

  • @abeatrix made their first contribution in #4048
  • @valinha made their first contribution in #3528

Full Changelog: v3.17.11...v3.17.12
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Free Grok Model Available! Access Grok 3 completely free through the Cline provider
  • Add collapsible MCP response panels to keep conversations focused on the main AI responses while still allowing access to detailed MCP output (Thanks @valinha!)
  • Prioritize active files (open tabs) at the top of the file context menu when using @ mentions (Thanks @abeatrix!)
  • Fix context menu to properly default to "File" option instead of incorrectly selecting "Git Commits"
  • Fix diff editing to handle out-of-order SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, improving reliability with models that don't follow strict ordering
  • Fix telemetry warning popup appearing repeatedly for users who have telemetry disabled

New Contributors

  • @abeatrix made their first contribution in #4048
  • @valinha made their first contribution in #3528

Full Changelog: v3.17.11...v3.17.12

item.title: 軟體更新v3.17.11：為Vertex AI和Google Gemini加入Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview支援
item.itunes:title: 軟體更新v3.17.11：為Vertex AI和Google Gemini加入Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview支援
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview 06-05 model to Vertex AI and Google Gemini providers

Full Changelog: v3.17.10...v3.17.11
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview 06-05 model to Vertex AI and Google Gemini providers

Full Changelog: v3.17.10...v3.17.11
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview 06-05 model to Vertex AI and Google Gemini providers

Full Changelog: v3.17.10...v3.17.11

item.title: v3.17.10 更新：支援 Qwen 3、多款新 AI 模型與功能優化
item.itunes:title: v3.17.10 更新：支援 Qwen 3、多款新 AI 模型與功能優化
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Qwen 3 series models with thinking mode options (Thanks @Jonny-china!)
  • Add new AskSage models: Claude 4 Sonnet, Claude 4 Opus, GPT 4.1, Gemini 2.5 Pro (Thanks @swhite24!)
  • Add VSCode walkthrough to help new users get started with Cline
  • Add support for streamable MCP servers
  • Improve Ollama model selection with filterable dropdown instead of radio buttons (Thanks @paulgear!)
  • Add setting to disable aggressive terminal reuse to help users experiencing task lockout issues
  • Fix settings dialog applying changes even when cancel button is clicked

New Contributors

  • @isabelizimm made their first contribution in #3989
  • @paulgear made their first contribution in #3999
  • @Jonny-china made their first contribution in #3692

Full Changelog: v3.17.9...v3.17.10
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Qwen 3 series models with thinking mode options (Thanks @Jonny-china!)
  • Add new AskSage models: Claude 4 Sonnet, Claude 4 Opus, GPT 4.1, Gemini 2.5 Pro (Thanks @swhite24!)
  • Add VSCode walkthrough to help new users get started with Cline
  • Add support for streamable MCP servers
  • Improve Ollama model selection with filterable dropdown instead of radio buttons (Thanks @paulgear!)
  • Add setting to disable aggressive terminal reuse to help users experiencing task lockout issues
  • Fix settings dialog applying changes even when cancel button is clicked

New Contributors

  • @isabelizimm made their first contribution in #3989
  • @paulgear made their first contribution in #3999
  • @Jonny-china made their first contribution in #3692

Full Changelog: v3.17.9...v3.17.10
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Qwen 3 series models with thinking mode options (Thanks @Jonny-china!)
  • Add new AskSage models: Claude 4 Sonnet, Claude 4 Opus, GPT 4.1, Gemini 2.5 Pro (Thanks @swhite24!)
  • Add VSCode walkthrough to help new users get started with Cline
  • Add support for streamable MCP servers
  • Improve Ollama model selection with filterable dropdown instead of radio buttons (Thanks @paulgear!)
  • Add setting to disable aggressive terminal reuse to help users experiencing task lockout issues
  • Fix settings dialog applying changes even when cancel button is clicked

New Contributors

  • @isabelizimm made their first contribution in #3989
  • @paulgear made their first contribution in #3999
  • @Jonny-china made their first contribution in #3692

Full Changelog: v3.17.9...v3.17.10

item.title: v3.17.9 更新：支援 Claude 4/Grok-3、CSV/XLSX 分析及多項修復
item.itunes:title: v3.17.9 更新：支援 Claude 4/Grok-3、CSV/XLSX 分析及多項修復
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Aligning Cline to work with Claude 4 model family (Experimental) (Thanks @heguro for the inspiration!)
  • Add task timeline scrolling feature
  • Add support for uploading CSV and XLSX files for data analysis and processing
  • Add stable Grok-3 models to xAI provider (grok-3, grok-3-fast, grok-3-mini, grok-3-mini-fast) and update default model from grok-3-beta to grok-3 (Thanks @PeterDaveHello!)
  • Add new models to Vertex AI provider
  • Add new model to Nebius AI Studio
  • Remove hard-coded temperature from LM Studio API requests and add support for reasoning_content in LM Studio responses
  • Display delay information when retrying API calls for better user feedback
  • Fix AWS Bedrock credential caching issue where externally updated credentials (e.g., by AWS Identity Manager) were not detected, requiring extension restart (Thanks @DaveFres!)
  • Fix search tool overloading conversation with massive outputs by setting maximum byte limit for responses
  • Fix checkpoints functionality
  • Fix token counting for xAI provider
  • Fix Ollama provider issues
  • Fix window title display for Windows users
  • Improve chat box UI

New Contributors

  • @KevinTurnbull made their first contribution in #3880
  • @dv01d made their first contribution in #3474
  • @octohedron made their first contribution in #1464
  • @elongl made their first contribution in #3876
  • @akhial made their first contribution in #3973
  • @npacker made their first contribution in #3971

Full Changelog: v3.17.8...v3.17.9
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Aligning Cline to work with Claude 4 model family (Experimental) (Thanks @heguro for the inspiration!)
  • Add task timeline scrolling feature
  • Add support for uploading CSV and XLSX files for data analysis and processing
  • Add stable Grok-3 models to xAI provider (grok-3, grok-3-fast, grok-3-mini, grok-3-mini-fast) and update default model from grok-3-beta to grok-3 (Thanks @PeterDaveHello!)
  • Add new models to Vertex AI provider
  • Add new model to Nebius AI Studio
  • Remove hard-coded temperature from LM Studio API requests and add support for reasoning_content in LM Studio responses
  • Display delay information when retrying API calls for better user feedback
  • Fix AWS Bedrock credential caching issue where externally updated credentials (e.g., by AWS Identity Manager) were not detected, requiring extension restart (Thanks @DaveFres!)
  • Fix search tool overloading conversation with massive outputs by setting maximum byte limit for responses
  • Fix checkpoints functionality
  • Fix token counting for xAI provider
  • Fix Ollama provider issues
  • Fix window title display for Windows users
  • Improve chat box UI

New Contributors

  • @KevinTurnbull made their first contribution in #3880
  • @dv01d made their first contribution in #3474
  • @octohedron made their first contribution in #1464
  • @elongl made their first contribution in #3876
  • @akhial made their first contribution in #3973
  • @npacker made their first contribution in #3971

Full Changelog: v3.17.8...v3.17.9
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Aligning Cline to work with Claude 4 model family (Experimental) (Thanks @heguro for the inspiration!)
  • Add task timeline scrolling feature
  • Add support for uploading CSV and XLSX files for data analysis and processing
  • Add stable Grok-3 models to xAI provider (grok-3, grok-3-fast, grok-3-mini, grok-3-mini-fast) and update default model from grok-3-beta to grok-3 (Thanks @PeterDaveHello!)
  • Add new models to Vertex AI provider
  • Add new model to Nebius AI Studio
  • Remove hard-coded temperature from LM Studio API requests and add support for reasoning_content in LM Studio responses
  • Display delay information when retrying API calls for better user feedback
  • Fix AWS Bedrock credential caching issue where externally updated credentials (e.g., by AWS Identity Manager) were not detected, requiring extension restart (Thanks @DaveFres!)
  • Fix search tool overloading conversation with massive outputs by setting maximum byte limit for responses
  • Fix checkpoints functionality
  • Fix token counting for xAI provider
  • Fix Ollama provider issues
  • Fix window title display for Windows users
  • Improve chat box UI

New Contributors

  • @KevinTurnbull made their first contribution in #3880
  • @dv01d made their first contribution in #3474
  • @octohedron made their first contribution in #1464
  • @elongl made their first contribution in #3876
  • @akhial made their first contribution in #3973
  • @npacker made their first contribution in #3971

Full Changelog: v3.17.8...v3.17.9

item.title: v3.17.8 更新：修復終端機卡死及「capture failure」問題
item.itunes:title: v3.17.8 更新：修復終端機卡死及「capture failure」問題
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Fix bug where terminal would get stuck and output "capture failure"

  • Fix bug where terminal would get stuck and output "capture failure"

  • Fix bug where terminal would get stuck and output "capture failure"

item.title: v3.17.7釋出：提升Claude 4家族Diff編輯可靠度
item.itunes:title: v3.17.7釋出：提升Claude 4家族Diff編輯可靠度
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Fix diff editing reliability for Claude 4 family models by adding constraints to prevent errors with large replacements

Full Changelog: v3.17.6...v3.17.7
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Fix diff editing reliability for Claude 4 family models by adding constraints to prevent errors with large replacements

Full Changelog: v3.17.6...v3.17.7
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Fix diff editing reliability for Claude 4 family models by adding constraints to prevent errors with large replacements

Full Changelog: v3.17.6...v3.17.7

item.title: v3.17.6版：新增Cerebras、支援多種檔案上傳、新手引導優化
item.itunes:title: v3.17.6版：新增Cerebras、支援多種檔案上傳、新手引導優化
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add Cerebras as a new API provider with 5 high-performance models including reasoning-capable models (Thanks @kevint-cerebras!)
  • Add support for uploading various file types (XML, JSON, TXT, LOG, MD, DOCX, IPYNB, PDF) alongside images
  • Add improved onboarding experience for new users with guided setup
  • Add prompt cache indicator for Gemini 2.5 Flash models
  • Update SambaNova provider with new model list and documentation links (Thanks @luisfucros!)
  • Fix diff editing support for Claude 4 family of models
  • Improve telemetry and analytics for better user experience insights

New Contributors

  • @luisfucros made their first contribution in #3419
  • @kevint-cerebras made their first contribution in #3810
  • @francisgreenleaf made their first contribution in #3836
  • @SeanGallen made their first contribution in #3820

Full Changelog: v3.17.5...v3.17.6
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add Cerebras as a new API provider with 5 high-performance models including reasoning-capable models (Thanks @kevint-cerebras!)
  • Add support for uploading various file types (XML, JSON, TXT, LOG, MD, DOCX, IPYNB, PDF) alongside images
  • Add improved onboarding experience for new users with guided setup
  • Add prompt cache indicator for Gemini 2.5 Flash models
  • Update SambaNova provider with new model list and documentation links (Thanks @luisfucros!)
  • Fix diff editing support for Claude 4 family of models
  • Improve telemetry and analytics for better user experience insights

New Contributors

  • @luisfucros made their first contribution in #3419
  • @kevint-cerebras made their first contribution in #3810
  • @francisgreenleaf made their first contribution in #3836
  • @SeanGallen made their first contribution in #3820

Full Changelog: v3.17.5...v3.17.6
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Add Cerebras as a new API provider with 5 high-performance models including reasoning-capable models (Thanks @kevint-cerebras!)
  • Add support for uploading various file types (XML, JSON, TXT, LOG, MD, DOCX, IPYNB, PDF) alongside images
  • Add improved onboarding experience for new users with guided setup
  • Add prompt cache indicator for Gemini 2.5 Flash models
  • Update SambaNova provider with new model list and documentation links (Thanks @luisfucros!)
  • Fix diff editing support for Claude 4 family of models
  • Improve telemetry and analytics for better user experience insights

New Contributors

  • @luisfucros made their first contribution in #3419
  • @kevint-cerebras made their first contribution in #3810
  • @francisgreenleaf made their first contribution in #3836
  • @SeanGallen made their first contribution in #3820

Full Changelog: v3.17.5...v3.17.6
